creator: pluknet@gmail.com
text:
audio/libmtp on 7.3 misbehaves without pkg-config,
which leads to not linking with -lusb:

checking for pkg-config... no
checking for LIBUSB... no
checking for LIBUSB... no
checking for usb_open in -lusb... yes
checking for openusb_init in -lopenusb... (cached) no
checking for libgcrypt... checking for gcry_check_version in -lgcrypt... yes
configure: MTPZ functionality enabled
configure: *** using libusb 0.1 ***

Compare with pkg-config installed:

checking pkg-config is at least version 0.9.0... yes
checking for LIBUSB... no
checking for LIBUSB... yes
checking for openusb_init in -lopenusb... (cached) no
checking for libgcrypt... checking for gcry_check_version in -lgcrypt... yes
configure: MTPZ functionality enabled
configure: *** using libusb 0.1.12 ***

Fix: Add pkg-config to dependencies. Tested on 7.3 only.

diff -urpN audio/libmtp.orig/Makefile audio/libmtp/Makefile
--- audio/libmtp.orig/Makefile  2012-06-01 13:38:09.000000000 +0400
+++ audio/libmtp/Makefile       2012-06-12 22:35:51.000000000 +0400
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ OPTIONS_DEFINE=       MTPZ
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=       MTPZ
 MTPZ_DESC=     Enable functionality to connect to MTPZ devices
 
-USE_GNOME=     gnomehack
+USE_GNOME=     gnomehack pkgconfig
 USE_ICONV=     yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=  yes


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: See pointyhat logs
